creator: ndowens04@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #1)
> This port needs to be removed:
> https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/dlmodeler/index.html
> It isn't on cran any more.
> 
> Nathan, FYI, all R packages can be easily installed from RStudio or R itself
> with just one command, ex. install.packages("R-cran-dlmodeler") which is
> virtually guaranteed to always work. Therefore, R-* ports aren't needed and
> aren't useful.
> 
> I recommend you spend time on updating ports that are actually useful.

Ok, this was in Ports and out of date so thought it would be useful, but i'll keep that in mind :)
